queries.question: What textbooks have a publisher email address of pearson@email.com and what e-books have the same publisher email?
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books JOIN Publishers ON Books.PublisherID = Publishers.PublisherID
WHERE (Books.Educational_Materials = 'Textbook' OR Books.Educational_Materials = 'E-Book') AND Publishers.email = "pearson@email.com"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Books .
  ?publishers a :Publishers .
  ?books p:hasPublishers ?publishers .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Educational_Materials ?educational_materials_w .
  ?books p:Educational_Materials ?educational_materials_w2 .
  ?publishers p:email ?email_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?educational_materials_w) = "Textbook" || STR(?educational_materials_w2) = "E-Book")) && STR(?email_w) = "pearson@email.com"))
}

queries.question: List all textbooks and also list e-books with a publisher email address of pearson@email.com.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM Books JOIN Publishers ON Books.PublisherID = Publishers.PublisherID
WHERE Books.Educational_Materials = 'Textbook' OR Books.Educational_Materials = 'E-Book' AND Publishers.email = "pearson@email.com"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?books a :Books .
  ?publishers a :Publishers .
  ?books p:hasPublishers ?publishers .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?books p:Educational_Materials ?educational_materials_w .
  ?books p:Educational_Materials ?educational_materials_w2 .
  ?publishers p:email ?email_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educational_materials_w) = "Textbook" || (STR(?educational_materials_w2) = "E-Book" && STR(?email_w) = "pearson@email.com")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show textbooks and e-books with a publisher email address of pearson@email.com.
